453 ROUTE_RSDNT_PAPER_CD ROUTE_RSDNT_PAPER_CD Patient Trans - Paper-based CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to the patient, family and/or caregiver was paper based. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
